summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Revium Labs rebrand and new 'Our Model' page. All major functionality working correctly with proper navigation updates and content structure.
passed_tests: Revium Labs branding displays correctly in header and footer
Desktop navigation shows 'Our Model' instead of 'Pricing'
Mobile navigation shows 'Our Model' in hamburger menu
Footer shows 'Our Model' link under Company section
/pricing route loads Our Model page correctly
Hero section displays 'HOW WE WORK' label and 'How We Build Your Revenue Engine' headline
Three phase cards render with Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 3 pills
Phase 2 card has highlighted border (featured styling)
Timeline section shows Phase 1 — Audit, Phase 2 — Fix, Phase 3 — Scale
Steps section shows 3 steps with numbered circles (01, 02, 03)
Differentiator section shows 4 cards with pink numbers (01, 3x, 5, 0)
Bottom CTA has two buttons: 'Request a Revenue Teardown' and 'Book a Strategy Session'
No dollar amounts or pricing references appear on the page content
Favicon.svg is properly set in index.html
All pages show 'Revium Labs' branding (not Lumiq)
Page meta titles and descriptions updated to Revium Labs
